heading: Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–432, § 192 Stat. 1046Oct. 10, 1978
label: 1482 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 95–432, § 192 Stat. 1046Oct. 10, 1978
notes: Section, , ch. 3, § 350, , provided that an individual with dual nationality who voluntarily claims the benefits of the foreign state nationality loses his United States nationality by having continuous residence in the foreign state for 3 years after having attained 22 years of age unless prior to the 3 year period he takes an oath of allegiance to the United States, or his residence in the foreign state was for a reason specified in section 1485(1), (2), (4), (5), (6), (7), or (8) of this title or section 1486(1) or (2) of this title.act June 27, 1952, ch. 477, title III66 Stat. 269
Effective Date of Repeal, , , provided that repeal of this section is effective .Pub. L. 95–432, § 192 Stat. 1046Oct. 10, 1978Oct. 10, 1978
amendments: Section, , ch. 3, § 350, , provided that an individual with dual nationality who voluntarily claims the benefits of the foreign state nationality loses his United States nationality by having continuous residence in the foreign state for 3 years after having attained 22 years of age unless prior to the 3 year period he takes an oath of allegiance to the United States, or his residence in the foreign state was for a reason specified in section 1485(1), (2), (4), (5), (6), (7), or (8) of this title or section 1486(1) or (2) of this title.act June 27, 1952, ch. 477, title III66 Stat. 269
